name: iran-memorial
description: Public, read-only MCP server for the Iran Memorial database. Search and cite over 37,000 documented victims of the Islamic Republic of Iran (1979–present). Five tools: search victims, fetch full profiles, list judicial executions, list death-row prisoners, fetch aggregate statistics. No API key required, CC BY-SA 4.0 data.
shortDescription: Cite-ready human-rights data: 37K+ Iranian victims, 12 sources, 1979–present.

IRAN_MEMORIAL_BASE_URL.description: Override the upstream HTTP API base URL — useful for self-hosted or staging deployments. Read-only at every layer.

tools.name: search_victims
tools.description: Full-text search over victim names (Latin and Farsi), places of death, and case details. Returns matches with profile slugs and citation-ready URLs.

tools.name: get_victim
tools.description: Full victim profile by slug — names, dates, places, charges, court, sources, photo URL, verification status. The slug comes from search_victims.

tools.name: get_executions
tools.description: Paginated list of judicial executions. Filterable by method (hanging, shooting, stoning, custody) and year. Useful for time-series and method-of-execution analysis.

parameters.method: enum · hanging | shooting | stoning | custody | other · optional

tools.name: get_death_row
tools.description: People currently sentenced to death and awaiting execution. Drives the activism CTA — these are the cases where international advocacy can still save lives.

tools.name: get_statistics
tools.description: Aggregate counts: total victims documented, events, sources, recent protest executions, current death-row size, years of repression.

security.readOnlyEnforcement: Postgres role with GRANT SELECT only — even a buggy server-side commit cannot mutate data. INSERT attempts return permission denied for table … at the database layer.
security.rateLimit: Per-IP sliding window in addition to upstream Cloudflare rate limit

data.sources: 12 verified human-rights / journalism / research organizations (Boroumand, HRANA, Hengaw, KHRN, CPJ, witness.report, …)
data.updateCadence: Weekly enrich cron + monthly Zenodo DOI snapshot

exampleQueries: Search for Mahsa Amini in the Iran Memorial database
Show me everyone executed by hanging in Iran in 2024
Who is currently on death row according to the Iran Memorial Project?
Cite the Iran Memorial profile of [name] in my article
Pattern of conduct linked to Judge Salavati
